front.title: An Experimental Connectivity Monitoring Metric for IPPM

abstract.t: Within a Segment Routing (SR) domain, segment routed measurement packets can be sent along pre-determined paths. This enables new kinds of active measurements. Connectivity monitoring supervises the state and performance of a connection or a (sub)path from central monitoring systems. This document specifies an experimental Type-p connectivity monitoring metric to accomodate such operational needs.
